chapter_title.en: Chapter 193 – The Tawaaf of the women (Tawaaf Al-Nisaa)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/202)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/202)
text: قَالَ أَبُو الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) فِي قَوْلِ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ وَ لْيَطَّوَّفُوا بِالْبَيْتِ الْعَتِيقِ قَالَ طَوَافُ الْفَرِيضَةِ طَوَافُ النِّسَاءِ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad who said,
‘Abu Al-Hassanasws said regarding the Words of Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic [22:29] and let them go round the Ancient House. Heasws said: ‘The Obligatory Tawaaf, the Tawaaf Al-Nisaa’.
en.sarwar: 1. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from Ahmad ibn Muhammad who has said the following: “This is about the words of Allah, most Majestic, most Glorious, ‘They must perform Tawaf around the free House. ’[22:29] Abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that the obligatory Tawaf is Tawaf of al-NisaY”
